creator: eculp@EnContacto.Net
text:
On my laptop running uptodate current and kernel.

I get the following termination message after maybe 10 seconds of acroread9 operation with or without opening a pdf file.

# acroread9
terminate called after throwing an instance of 'RSException'

Thanks

How-To-Repeat: Start acroread9 in any way, clicking on an icon or starting on the command line with or without opening a pdf file.
